sources.sourcePrompt: Create a single full-body pixel-art character asset: a young male fantasy hero with light armor, blue scarf, simple longsword at his side, confident relaxed pose, clean heroic silhouette, centered idle-animation-ready stance, clear feet contact, transparent background preferred, crisp 32-bit RPG pixel-art rendering, no scenery, no readable text, no logo, no watermark.
